# AGENTS.md â€” click

Composable command-line interface toolkit (Python library). This file is the standing context
for AI coding agents working in this repo; see `README.md` for the human-facing intro and
`docs/` for usage docs.

## Project layout

- `src/click/` â€” the library source (the package is `click`).
- `tests/` â€” pytest suite. `tests/typing/` holds files that exist only to be type-checked.
- `docs/` â€” Sphinx docs.
- `examples/` â€” standalone example apps; excluded from lint/type config.
- Packaging: `flit_core` build backend; metadata + all tool config live in `pyproject.toml`.

## Environment setup  âś… verified 2026-05-13

This project uses **uv** (there is a committed `uv.lock`; CI uses `astral-sh/setup-uv`). Do
**not** use a bare `pip install -e .` against your system Python â€” `requires-python` is `>=3.10`
and a too-old interpreter will fail with `Package 'click' requires a different Python`.

```sh
uv sync --locked          # creates .venv with a suitable Python (3.12 locally) + dev/test/typing/pre-commit groups
```

Then prefix commands with `uv run` (e.g. `uv run python`, `uv run pytest`). A `.devcontainer/`
is also provided if you prefer a container.

## Running tests  âś… verified 2026-05-13

```sh
uv run pytest                       # full suite â€” ~1500 tests, a few seconds
uv run pytest tests/test_options.py # one file
uv run pytest -k some_name          # by keyword
```

- Pytest config is in `pyproject.toml` (`[tool.pytest.ini_options]`): `testpaths = ["tests"]`,
  warnings are errors (`filterwarnings = ["error"]`), and `stress` tests are deselected by
  default (`addopts = "-m 'not stress'"`). Run them explicitly with `uv run tox run -e stress`.
- To reproduce a CI matrix env: `uv run tox run -e py3.13` (envs: `py3.10`..`py3.14`, `py3.14t`,
  `pypy3.11`). `uv run tox run` (no `-e`) runs the whole matrix plus `style`, `typing`, `docs`.

## Lint & format  âś… verified 2026-05-13

```sh
uv run ruff check .       # lint  (rules: B, E, F, I, UP, W â€” see [tool.ruff.lint])
uv run ruff format .      # format
uv run tox run -e style   # equivalently: run all pre-commit hooks on all files
```

`ruff` is configured with `fix = true`, so `ruff check --fix` auto-fixes. There's a
`.pre-commit-config.yaml`; install hooks with `uv run --group pre-commit pre-commit install`.

## Type checking  âś… verified 2026-05-13

```sh
uv run tox run -e typing  # runs mypy (strict) + pyright --verifytypes
```

mypy/pyright config is in `pyproject.toml`; both check `src` and `tests/typing`.

## Conventions

- Python â‰Ą 3.10; keep the lib dependency-free (only `colorama` on Windows).
- `ruff` isort settings: single-line imports, not ordered by type â€” don't hand-reformat imports.
- All tool configuration goes in `pyproject.toml`, not standalone config files.
- Changelog: add an entry to `CHANGES.rst` for user-visible changes.
- After editing dependencies, refresh the lock: `uv lock` (CI checks `--locked`).

## Build & docs (rarely needed by agents)

- Build the package: `uv build` (flit backend).
- Build docs: `uv run tox run -e docs` â†’ `docs/_build/dirhtml`.
